arts.ttl: Erling Haaland hands Arsenal Premier League title race upper hand with bizarre Man City decision
arts.sum: It was attack versus defence in the second half as Arsenal were content to hold what they had and utilise the best defence in the league to keep City out. Sky Sports commentator Peter Drury said at the end of the match at the Etihad Stadium that Manchester City versus Arsenal would live long in the memory.

arts.ttl: Rodri, De Bruyne, Ake - Man City injury news and return dates before Watford
arts.sum: Manchester City injury news as Pep Guardiola suffers two concerning injury blows in the aftermath of Sunday's 2-2 draw with Arsenal

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher disagrees with angry Arsenal stars after Leandro Trossard red card
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard's second yellow for kicking the ball away during the heated showdown against Manchester City was the correct decision, claims Jamie Carragher. Post-red card, a sympathetic Mikel Arteta offered Trossard a reassuring embrace as he exited the field, but Gary Neville, sharing punditry duties with Carragher, remained sceptical.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's angry reaction against Arsenal can't hide obvious Man City problems
arts.sum: Manchester City manager was seen kicking a seat during his team's Premier League draw against Arsenal on a tough afternoon for the champions at the Etihad Stadium

arts.ttl: 4 key battles that could decide Man City vs Arsenal
arts.sum: It's first versus second in the Premier League this weekend, as defending champions Manchester City take on their biggest title rivals Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium. Haaland has been in demonstrative form in the first few weeks of the 2024/25 campaign, netting a rather ridiculous nine goals in just four league games thus far.

arts.ttl: Man City 2-2 Arsenal: Player ratings as champions escape with a point against 10-man Gunners
arts.sum: A man down invited pressure for Arsenal, but the visitors did a great job of repelling it, limiting City only to shots from distance in the early stages of the second half. But Arsenal struck back, first with a stunner from Riccardo Calafiori and then a bullet Gabriel header for the second game running.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker's foul-mouthed response sums up Man City woes after Arsenal howler
arts.sum: MAN CITY 2-2 ARSENAL: Premier League champions Man City just about earned a point in their clash with the Gunners at the Etihad Stadium but one star in particular appears to be struggling

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola issues Rodri injury update after Man City's thriller with Arsenal
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is unsure of the severity of the injury that Rodri suffered in Manchester City's pulsating 2-2 draw with Arsenal in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Draw at Man City a sure sign 'remarkable' Arsenal can win the title
arts.sum: Inevitably, mixed in with immense pride at his side’s dogged defiance and conviction that they had "made another big step today as a team and individually", there was disappointment for Arsenal and Arteta having come so close to a first league win at Man City since 2015. The Gunners, who have become Man City’s nearest challengers as runners-up in each of the last two seasons, were seconds away from what would surely have been Arteta’s best win in charge of Arsenal had they held on.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Watford: Carabao Cup prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s side strong favourites to reach fourth round
